overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, atmospheric forest at night. The character traverses a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense pine trees under an overcast sky, pausing briefly to survey the surroundings and look up at the dramatic cloud formations.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path surrounded by tall pine trees

entered.detail: dense forest of tall evergreen trees surrounding the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking through a dense pine forest at night. The narrow dirt trail winds through tall evergreen trees with snow-capped mountains visible in the far distance under an overcast sky.

events.description: character stops walking and begins turning to survey the surroundings
character looks up at the dramatic cloudy night sky

agents.ego_description: pausing to look around the environment, examining the dead trees and gazing up at the turbulent clouds

entered.detail: tall dead tree with no leaves, bare branches reaching upward
open grassy area with sparse vegetation
turbulent dark cloud formations covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a more open forest clearing with dead leafless trees and sparse grass. The camera pans around as the character surveys the environment, revealing dramatic turbulent clouds covering the night sky. Snow-capped mountains remain visible to the left while the character looks upward at the atmospheric sky.

events.description: character resumes walking forward along the forest path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path deeper into the dark pine forest

entered.detail: returning to dense forest of tall evergreen trees
narrow dirt trail continuing through the woods

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking forward, re-entering the dense pine forest. The trail becomes enclosed again by tall evergreen trees as the character moves deeper into the woods, leaving the open clearing and dramatic sky view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest that briefly opens into a desolate clearing before closing back in. It begins by following a character along a narrow dirt trail winding through tall evergreens, with snow-capped mountains looming in the far distance under an overcast night sky. As the path widens, the scene shifts into an open clearing filled with sparse grass and dead, leafless trees, where the camera pans upward to reveal dramatic, turbulent clouds swirling above. The character then resumes their forward motion, causing the environment to contract as they re-enter the thick pine woods. Finally, the trail becomes enclosed once more by towering evergreens, leaving the open sky and clearing behind as the character moves deeper into the forest.
